input.command:
cat << 'EOF' > /app/explore.py
import pexpect, sys
child = pexpect.spawn('qemu-system-x86_64 -m 1024 -cdrom /app/alpine.iso -netdev user,id=net0,hostfwd=tcp::2222-:22 -device e1000,netdev=net0 -nographic', encoding='utf-8')
child.logfile = sys.stdout
child.expect('localhost login:', timeout=60)
child.sendline('root')
child.expect('localhost:~#', timeout=10)
child.sendline('apk add openssh')
child.expect('localhost:~#', timeout=30)
child.sendline('rc-service sshd start')
child.expect('localhost:~#', timeout=10)
print("\nDone exploring")
EOF

input.command:
cat << 'EOF' > /app/run_vm.py
import pexpect, sys, time

def start_vm():
    child = pexpect.spawn('qemu-system-x86_64 -m 1024 -cdrom /app/alpine.iso -netdev user,id=net0,hostfwd=tcp::2222-:22 -device e1000,netdev=net0 -nographic', encoding='utf-8')
    child.logfile = sys.stdout
    child.expect('localhost login:', timeout=60)
    child.sendline('root')
    child.expect('localhost:~#', timeout=10)
    child.sendline('apk add openssh')
    child.expect('localhost:~#', timeout=60)
    child.sendline('sed -i "s/^#PermitRootLogin.*/PermitRootLogin yes/" /etc/ssh/sshd_config')
    child.expect('localhost:~#', timeout=10)
    child.sendline('echo "root:password123" | chpasswd')
    child.expect('localhost:~#', timeout=10)
    child.sendline('rc-service sshd start')
    child.expect('localhost:~#', timeout=30)
    print("\nVM is ready!")
    
    # keep alive
    while True:
        time.sleep(10)

if __name__ == "__main__":
    start_vm()
EOF
nohup python3 /app/run_vm.py > /app/vm.log 2>&1 &
echo "Started VM script in background"

import pexpect, sys, time

def start_vm():
    child = pexpect.spawn('qemu-system-x86_64 -m 1024 -cdrom /app/alpine.iso -netdev user,id=net0,hostfwd=tcp::2222-:22 -device e1000,netdev=net0 -nographic', encoding='utf-8')

    child.expect('localhost login:', timeout=60)

    child.expect('localhost:~#', timeout=10)
    child.sendline('apk add openssh')
    child.expect('localhost:~#', timeout=60)
    child.sendline('sed -i "s/.*PermitRootLogin.*/PermitRootLogin yes/" /etc/ssh/sshd_config')
    child.expect('localhost:~#', timeout=10)
    child.sendline('echo "root:password123" | chpasswd')
    child.expect('localhost:~#', timeout=10)
    child.sendline('rc-service sshd start')
    child.expect('localhost:~#', timeout=30)
    
    # keep alive
    while True:
        time.sleep(10)

if __name__ == "__main__":
    start_vm()
EOF

import pexpect, sys, time

def start_vm():
    child = pexpect.spawn('qemu-system-x86_64 -m 1024 -cdrom /app/alpine.iso -netdev user,id=net0,hostfwd=tcp::2222-:22 -device e1000,netdev=net0 -nographic', encoding='utf-8')
    child.logfile = open('/app/vm_output.log', 'w')
    child.expect('localhost login:', timeout=60)
    child.sendline('root')
    child.expect('localhost:~#', timeout=10)
    child.sendline('apk add openssh')
    child.expect('localhost:~#', timeout=60)
    child.sendline('sed -i "s/.*PermitRootLogin.*/PermitRootLogin yes/" /etc/ssh/sshd_config')
    child.expect('localhost:~#', timeout=10)
    child.sendline('echo "root:password123" | chpasswd')
    child.expect('localhost:~#', timeout=10)
    child.sendline('rc-service sshd start')
    child.expect('localhost:~#', timeout=30)
    
    # keep alive
    while True:
        time.sleep(10)

if __name__ == "__main__":
    start_vm()

input.command:
cat << 'EOF' > /app/run_vm.py
import pexpect, sys, time

def start_vm():
    child = pexpect.spawn('qemu-system-x86_64 -m 1024 -cdrom /app/alpine.iso -netdev user,id=net0,hostfwd=tcp::2222-:22 -device e1000,netdev=net0 -nographic', encoding='utf-8')
    child.logfile = open('/app/vm_output.log', 'w')
    child.expect('localhost login:', timeout=60)
    child.sendline('root')
    child.expect('localhost:~#', timeout=10)
    
    # Configure SSH
    child.sendline('apk add openssh')
    child.expect('localhost:~#', timeout=60)
    
    # Allow root login
    child.sendline('sed -i "s/.*PermitRootLogin.*/PermitRootLogin yes/" /etc/ssh/sshd_config')
    child.expect('localhost:~#', timeout=10)
    
    # Set password
    child.sendline('echo "root:password123" | chpasswd')
    child.expect('localhost:~#', timeout=10)
    
    # Start SSH
    child.sendline('rc-service sshd start')
    child.expect('localhost:~#', timeout=30)
    
    print("\nVM is ready!")
    
    # keep alive
    while True:
        time.sleep(10)

if __name__ == "__main__":
    start_vm()
EOF

import pexpect, sys

child = pexpect.spawn('qemu-system-x86_64 -m 1024 -cdrom /app/alpine.iso -netdev user,id=net0,hostfwd=tcp::2222-:22 -device e1000,netdev=net0 -nographic', encoding='utf-8')
child.logfile = sys.stdout
child.expect('localhost login:', timeout=60)
child.sendline('root')
child.expect('localhost:~#', timeout=10)
child.sendline('ip a')
child.expect('localhost:~#', timeout=10)
child.sendline('ping -c 1 8.8.8.8')
child.expect('localhost:~#', timeout=10)
print("\nDone")
EOF

input.command:
cat << 'EOF' > /app/run_vm.py
import pexpect, sys, time

def start_vm():
    child = pexpect.spawn('qemu-system-x86_64 -m 1024 -cdrom /app/alpine.iso -netdev user,id=net0,hostfwd=tcp::2222-:22 -device e1000,netdev=net0 -nographic', encoding='utf-8')
    child.logfile = open('/app/vm_output.log', 'w')
    child.expect('localhost login:', timeout=60)
    child.sendline('root')
    child.expect('localhost:~#', timeout=10)
    
    # Setup network
    child.sendline('ip link set eth0 up')
    child.expect('localhost:~#', timeout=10)
    child.sendline('udhcpc -i eth0')
    child.expect('localhost:~#', timeout=10)

    # Configure SSH
    child.sendline('apk add openssh')
    child.expect('localhost:~#', timeout=60)
    
    # Allow root login
    child.sendline('sed -i "s/.*PermitRootLogin.*/PermitRootLogin yes/" /etc/ssh/sshd_config')
    child.expect('localhost:~#', timeout=10)
    
    # Set password
    child.sendline('echo "root:password123" | chpasswd')
    child.expect('localhost:~#', timeout=10)
    
    # Start SSH
    child.sendline('rc-service sshd start')
    child.expect('localhost:~#', timeout=30)
    
    print("\nVM is ready!")
    
    # keep alive
    while True:
        time.sleep(10)

if __name__ == "__main__":
    start_vm()
EOF
tmux new-session -d -s qemu "python3 /app/run_vm.py"
sleep 20

    f.write("""import pexpect, sys, time

def start_vm():
    child = pexpect.spawn('qemu-system-x86_64 -m 1024 -cdrom /app/alpine.iso -netdev user,id=net0,hostfwd=tcp::2222-:22 -device e1000,netdev=net0 -nographic', encoding='utf-8')
    child.logfile = open('/app/vm_output.log', 'w')
    child.expect('localhost login:', timeout=60)
    child.sendline('root')
    child.expect('localhost:~#', timeout=10)
    
    # Setup network
    child.sendline('ip link set eth0 up')
    child.expect('localhost:~#', timeout=10)
    child.sendline('udhcpc -i eth0')
    child.expect('localhost:~#', timeout=10)

    # Configure SSH
    child.sendline('apk add openssh')
    child.expect('localhost:~#', timeout=60)
    
    # Allow root login
    child.sendline('sed -i "s/.*PermitRootLogin.*/PermitRootLogin yes/" /etc/ssh/sshd_config')
    child.expect('localhost:~#', timeout=10)
    
    # Set password
    child.sendline('echo "root:password123" | chpasswd')
    child.expect('localhost:~#', timeout=10)
    
    # Start SSH
    child.sendline('rc-service sshd start')
    child.expect('localhost:~#', timeout=30)
    
    print("\\nVM is ready!")
    
    # keep alive
    while True:
        time.sleep(10)

if __name__ == "__main__":
    start_vm()
""")
